c74object.name: tap.vco~
c74object.description: The tap.vco~ object is a virtual-analog oscillator: the classic waveforms with polyBLEP alias suppression instead of the naive shapes of trivial generators. A single shape parameter morphs continuously from sine (0) through triangle (1) and saw (2) to pulse (3) — fractional values crossfade adjacent shapes, and because shape rides the per-sample parameter ramps, slow sweeps and preset morphs glide through hybrid waveforms. The pulse width is adjustable (1-99%). The second inlet takes a through-zero linear FM signal calibrated in Hz (modulation deeper than the carrier frequency reverses the phase cleanly), and the third inlet is a hard-sync input: a rising zero crossing resets the phase with sub-sample accuracy and an alias-corrected step. The analog-character section adds a slow random pitch drift (in cents, deterministic per seed — give mc. instances different seeds to decorrelate them) and a static detune. Sixteen preset slots can be stored and morphed between. Pairs naturally with tap.ladder~.

method.name: waveform
method.description: Snap the shape to a classic waveform: sine, triangle, saw, or pulse.

method.name: float
method.description: In the left inlet, sets the frequency in Hz.

method.name: store
method.description: Store the current parameters in a preset slot (1-16).

method.name: recall
method.description: Morph all parameters to a stored preset (1-16). The optional second argument overrides the morph time in milliseconds (default: the interp attribute).

method.name: clear
method.description: Reset the oscillator phase and drift state.

attribute.name: frequency
attribute.description: Frequency in Hz (0.01-20000, down to LFO rates). A signal in the left inlet overrides this per sample.

attribute.name: shape
attribute.description: Waveform morph (0-3): 0 = sine, 1 = triangle, 2 = saw, 3 = pulse. Fractional values crossfade between the adjacent shapes.

attribute.name: pw
attribute.description: Pulse width in percent (1-99), active as shape approaches 3.

attribute.name: drift
attribute.description: Slow random pitch-drift depth in cents (0-100) — the analog-character control. Deterministic per seed.

attribute.name: seed
attribute.description: Seed for the drift generator (1 or higher). Different seeds decorrelate the drift of multiple instances (e.g. under mc.).

attribute.name: interp
attribute.description: Default preset-morph time in milliseconds used by the recall message.

attribute.name: smooth
attribute.description: Anti-zipper interpolation time in milliseconds applied to parameter changes.
